_comment: Sun Home Eclipse 2 DP map, reverse-engineered live in Phase 1 (2026-06-20). Device identity (devId/localKey/ip) lives in the gitignored options.json, not here.

power.note: Unit power on/off. Interior LED comes on with power. Setting false powers the whole unit down.

heater.note: Heating element on/off — the core control. Confirmed LAN-writable.

target_temp_f.note: Target setpoint in Fahrenheit. Firmware may clamp out-of-range values.

timer_set_min.note: Session duration. Writing it resets timer_remaining (105).

footwell_light.note: Floor/footwell light. Confirmed LAN-writable (toggled off remotely).

chromo_color.colors_approx: white + yellow/red/purple/blue/light-blue/green (exact value->color order TBD — verbal cycle was approximate; earlier single test gave mode3=red)
chromo_color.note: Interior ceiling LED color. Power-on resets to 'mode'.

chromo_cycle.note: Rainbow / color-cycle scene. Also brings the footwell light on while active.

power_status.note: Read-only run/status flag; LAN writes ignored and it flickers. Use DP110 to control power.

111.note: Purpose unknown — never changed during mapping. Possibly a config/limit.

not_controllable.exterior_light: Panel-only — toggling it at the panel changed NO DP, and DP writes don't drive it. ember cannot switch the exterior light.
not_controllable.interior_on_off_separate_from_color: Chromo on/off appears scene/power-tied rather than a clean bool; control color via DP21 and the unit via power.
